sources.title: Sssshhh 2003 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Esubs

metadata.Plot: On a college campus in Simla, India there are killings taking place by an unstoppable killer. The main target is a woman by the name of Mehak Gujral who has received several threatening telephone calls and has had many horrific experiences with the killer. With everyone being a suspect the police are unable to point finger or incarcerate anyone as there are insufficient evidence.
metadata.Actors: Tanishaa Mukerji, Dino Morea, Karan Nath
